rows.definition: Planner's chosen resident view: selected set, elided set, and accounting
rows.distinction: Planner's resident view selection - NOT Plan (memq) (static explain output)

rows.definition: Static pre-execution Explain output: pipeline steps, effects, and mutations
rows.distinction: Static pre-execution explain output - NOT Plan (planner) (resident view)

rows.definition: Scored span the planner may keep resident with cost, benefit, and density metrics
rows.distinction: Scored span input to planner - NOT Plan (planner's output)
